_publications._publicationTitle: Reprogramming Captures the Genetic and Tumorigenic Properties of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: when we co-cultured NF1(−/−) iPSC-derived SCs with DRG neurons, they kept proliferating during the assay and were not able to properly associate and form myelinating axons
details: Poor ability to myelinate axons and inability to properly associate and form myelinating axons when co-cultured with DRG neurons
